'''√k-m-w''' ('''kakamaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quakeproof|quakeproof]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-m-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quakeproof|quakeproof]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √k-m-w
|-
! Lemma
| kakamaw
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thikamaw || jikamaw || shikamaw || kikamaw
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthukamaw || jujukamaw || shushukamaw || kukukamaw
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thukamaw || jukamaw || shukamaw || kukamaw
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thukamaw || jukamaw || shukamaw || kukamaw
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thekamaw || jekamaw || shekamaw || kekamaw
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothokamaw || jojokamaw || shoshokamaw || kokokamaw
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thokamaw || jokamaw || shokamaw || kokamaw
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thokamaw || jokamaw || shokamaw || kokamaw
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || kamaw || kamaw || kamaw || kamaw
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || kamaw || kamaw || kamaw || kamaw
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || kamaw || kamaw || kamaw || kamaw
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || kamaw || kamaw || kamaw || kamaw
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thækamaw || jækamaw || shækamaw || kækamaw
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathakamaw || jajakamaw || shashakamaw || kakakamaw
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thakamaw || jakamaw || shakamaw || kakamaw
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thakamaw || jakamaw || shakamaw || kakamaw
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shakamaw
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshakamaw
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishakamaw
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shakamawnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshakamawnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishakamawnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shakamawshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshakamawnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishakamawshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shakamawro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshakamawnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishakamawro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shakamawmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshakamawnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishakamawmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shakamawsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshakamawnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishakamawsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shakamawng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshakamawnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishakamawng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shakamawya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshakamawnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishakamawya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shakamawyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshakamawnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishakamawyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shakamawnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshakamawnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishakamawnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shakamawnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshakamawnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishakamawnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shakamawnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshakamawnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishakamawnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shakamawshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshakamawnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishakamawshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shakamawshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshakamawnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishakamawshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shakamawshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshakamawnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishakamawshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shakamawronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshakamawnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishakamawronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shakamawroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshakamawnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishakamawroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shakamawromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshakamawnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishakamawromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shakamawmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshakamawnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishakamawmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shakamawmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshakamawnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishakamawmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shakamawmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshakamawnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishakamawmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
